name: shadow-companion
title: Shadow Companion
description: Control Shadow Companion — TTS echo for language shadowing with Handy
author: leovoon

commands.name: control
commands.title: Control Server
commands.description: Start, stop, or check status of Shadow Companion

commands.name: switch-voice
commands.title: Switch Voice
commands.description: Change the TTS voice for Shadow Companion

commands.name: switch-provider
commands.title: Switch Provider
commands.description: Switch between Kokoro (built-in voices) and NeuTTS (voice cloning)

commands.name: adjust-speed
commands.title: Adjust Speed
commands.description: Change the speech speed multiplier (Kokoro only)
